name: DOCTOR STRANGE
description: As the Sorcerer Supreme, Doctor Stephen Strange gracefully wields ancient spells to turn the tide of even the most impossible battle. However, magic always comes at a cost, and each use of his arcane abilities gradually awakens the darkness within him.
lore: Respected surgeon Stephen Strange was forced to seek a different path when his hands were injured in a terrible accident. Devoting himself to the mystic arts, Strange became this dimension's first line of defense against supernatural threats — the Sorcerer Supreme. Sensing a massive temporal disturbance, Doctor Strange performed an arcane ritual to protect his reality. The spell failed, and Strange and his Sanctum Sanctorum became trapped within the Mirror Dimension. Lost in the timestream, Strange uses his mystic mastery to free himself for short spans of time in order to join the fight.

stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 10m, decreasing to 80% at 20m
stats.Fire Rate: 5.56 rounds per second, with a 0.03-second interval between every two rounds

abilities.name: Eye of Agamotto
abilities.description: Separate nearby enemies' Souls from their bodies. Damage dealt to these Souls is transferred to their physical bodies

stats.Casting: Single-cast spell field that surrounds the caster

abilities.name: Cloak of Levitation
abilities.description: Ascend and then enter a brief state of sustained flight

abilities.name: Maelstrom of Madness
abilities.description: Release Dark Magic to deal damage to nearby enemies

stats.Casting: Single-cast spell field that surrounds the caster
stats.Damage: Each point of Dark Magic deals 1.3 damage

abilities.name: Pentagram of Farallah
abilities.description: Open portals between two locations, enabling all units to travel through them

abilities.name: Shield of the Seraphim
abilities.description: Create a protective barrier against damage

abilities.name: Price of Magic
abilities.description: Dark Magic accumulates with every hit on an enemy. If Dark Magic peaks for too long, Doctor Strange will be cursed with Anti-Heal

stats.Generate Dark Magic: Daggers of Denak: Each hit generates 3.5 Dark Magic. When using the V key, every enemy hit generates 10 Dark Magic

received.name: Enchanted Enhancement
received.description: Doctor Strange shares his arcane mastery, replacing Scarlet Witch's Chthonian Burst with Mystic Burst upon activation. Hold down the attack button to unleash a rapid, relentless salvo of magical missiles in the target direction

received.name: PSIONIC VORTEX
received.description: Invisible Woman enhances Doctor Strange's Maelstrom of Madness with a psionic explosion. The explosion damages and pulls enemies toward Doctor Strange. Based on the explosion's damage, Doctor Strange and nearby allies gain Bonus Health

stats.Damage: Each point of energy deals 1.3 damage.
stats.Special Effect: The spell field pulls enemies in range toward Doctor Strange

base.description: Upgrade Maelstrom of Madness to Gamma Maelstrom. This drastically boosts energy charge rates and removes the Anti-Heal curse.

stats.Damage: Each point of Dark Magic deals 1.3 damage.
stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 6m, decreasing to 75% at 10m

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Hulk, releasing Gamma Maelstrom retains some energy, and stored Gamma energy doesn't decay over time.

base.description: Upgrade Maelstrom of Madness to Psionic Vortex. Enemies caught in are Launched toward you. Shield of the Seraphim also gains increased shield value.

stats.Damage: Each point of Dark Magic deals 1.3 damage.
stats.Special Effect: The spell field pulls enemies within range toward itself

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Invisible Woman, any damage dealt by Psionic Vortex provides proportional Bonus Health for Doctor Strange.
